name: HRG_GOALS
description: Worker goals and its alignment details

columns.Name: GOAL_ID
columns.Comments: The system generated surrogate key for this entry.

columns.Name: LAST_MODIFIED_BY
columns.Comments: This field store the person id of the person who modified the goals last time.

columns.Name: LAST_MODIFIED_DATE
columns.Comments: Field to store value of last goal modification timestamp

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_BUSINESS_GROUPS

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M, which holds assignment of worker.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person Id of the person to whom the goal is assigned to.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: Reference to the organization to which goal is being created.

columns.Name: PUBLISHED_FLAG
columns.Comments: To Suggest if Organization goal is published.

columns.Name: PUBLISH_DATE
columns.Comments: The goal publish date

columns.Name: GOAL_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Type of goal. Possible values are Development, Performance, Both and Personal

columns.Name: GOAL_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of goal.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description of goal.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start date of goal.

columns.Name: TARGET_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Target completion date of gaol.

columns.Name: SUCCESS_CRITERIA
columns.Comments: Criteria to complete goal.

columns.Name: SUCCESS_CRITERIA_TEXT
columns.Comments: New column for capturing criteria to complete goal.

columns.Name: PERCENT_COMPLETE_CODE
columns.Comments: Goal completion percentage code.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Status of goal.

columns.Name: APPROVAL_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Approval status code populated when goal is under some approval process

columns.Name: ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Actual completion date of goal.

columns.Name: REQUEST_CONTEXT
columns.Comments: Goal creation context.

columns.Name: GOAL_VERSION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Lookup to handle frozen goals and also goals created by HR specialist for mass assignment.

columns.Name: VERSION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date of goal version creation.

columns.Name: PRIORITY_CODE
columns.Comments: Priority of goal. Possible values are High, Medium and Low.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: To capture comments on the goal

columns.Name: COMMENTS_TEXT
columns.Comments: New column to capture comments on the goal.

columns.Name: REQUESTER_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F, which holds the PersonId of requester.

columns.Name: ASSIGNED_BY_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F, which holds the ID of person who assigns goal to worker.

columns.Name: GOAL_SOURCE_CODE
columns.Comments: Source of assignment. Possible values are Admin, HR, Manager and Worker.

columns.Name: REFERENCE_CONTENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS_B, which holds the ID of a goal in library. It represents the source of this goal record.

columns.Name: REFERENCE_GOAL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS_B, which holds the ID of a goal in library. It represents the source of the goal.

columns.Name: PRIVATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate whether this goal is accessible to others or not

columns.Name: ACCESS_TO_HIERARCHY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate this goal can be accessible to the hierarchy

columns.Name: HRCHY_ACCESS_GRANT_DATE
columns.Comments: Hieararchy access grant date.

columns.Name: ALLOW_KEY_ATTR_UPDATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Key attribute modification is allowed or not.

columns.Name: ALLOW_DEL_GOAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Manager can delete worker goal or not.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_IN_PERFDOC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Goal is marked to include in performance document.

columns.Name: GOAL_URL
columns.Comments: URL related to the goal.

columns.Name: LEVEL_CODE
columns.Comments: Leve code i.e Stretch or Maximum

columns.Name: LEVEL_MEANING
columns.Comments: Meaning of Level.

columns.Name: CATEGORY_CODE
columns.Comments: Admin-defined category for a goal.

columns.Name: MEASURE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Code for the measurement type

columns.Name: MEASURE_NAME
columns.Comments: For qualitative vs. quantitative measures. Target you are trying to hit.

columns.Name: MEASURE_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comments for measurement of a goal

columns.Name: TARGET_VALUE
columns.Comments: Value of the target for the quantitative measures.

columns.Name: TARGET_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of target for the quantitative measures

columns.Name: UOM_CODE
columns.Comments: Units of measure, %, dollar amounts, etc

columns.Name: ACTUAL_VALUE
columns.Comments: Actual value attained for the quantitative measures

columns.Name: MASS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRG_GOAL_MASS_REQUESTS

columns.Name: GOAL_EXT_ID
columns.Comments: Not unique at worker level

columns.Name: GOAL_ACCESS_LEVEL_CODE
columns.Comments: Propagate the read-only status from goal plan. If the goal is part of two contradicting goal plans (Yes wins always - among the read-only or updatable goal plans

columns.Name: GOAL_SUB_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Goal Sub Type Code is to support customer specific requirements like extensibility.

columns.Name: MEASURE_CALC_RULE_CODE
columns.Comments: Aggregated function for aggregating the actual and target values at sub-goal (only AVG or SUM). Looup HRG_CALCULATION_RULE_CODE will list the values.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Active Flag used only for Career Development Goal

columns.Name: GOAL_APPROVAL_STATE
columns.Comments: Goal Approval State included for Mass Goal Approval

columns.Name: APPROVER_RESPONSE_CODE
columns.Comments: Response from Approver on a Goal after Goal is rejected

columns.Name: PREVIOUS_STATE_GOAL_ID
columns.Comments: Previous state goal id value relevant during mass goal approval flow

columns.Name: LONG_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: New column to capture long description of the goal.
